$meta.name: Path of Ambition — Equipment Rules
$meta.source: codified from builder-1.0 lib/characterCalc.ts calcArmorDefense/calcCarryWeight; stat caps agree with items.json armor_types
notes: Armor Defense = base + armor_bonus + shield_bonus + min(stat_cap, stat); masterwork raises the stat cap.
Special formulas (spell armor, unarmored defense) replace the whole calculation while active.

Medium.note: wearer picks the stat per armor piece (mediumArmorStat)

Light.agile_bonus: add Tier while the Agile rule applies

Unarmored.agile_bonus: add Tier while the Agile rule applies

armor_defense.masterwork: masterwork_bonus adds to the category stat_cap

special.superseded_by: alternate_defense boons — the engine evaluates each boon's own formula + condition (compute.ts). These entries are documentation only; the boon formulas are the single source of truth.

unarmored_defense.condition: granted by boon (e.g. Berserker) and no armor equipped

wounds.armor_wound_bonus: equipped armor wound_bonus adds to max Wounds

shields.armor_bonus: shield armor bonus adds to Armor Defense when equipped
shields.reduction_pool: shields carry their own reduction pool (max/current tracked on the inventory item)

dual_wield.default: not allowed unless an equipment_rule_override boon grants allow_dual_wield
